title: Release overlooking wins, allow gratitude
subtitle: A release-and-allow practice for clearing the habit of discounting progress while waiting for one large breakthrough.
excerpt: A short energy statement from the MONEY program. The release names the pattern of bypassing steady income; the allow opens to receiving and celebrating what's already arriving.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 49 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use at the end of a week where money arrived but you didn't mark it.

content.text: A short energy statement from Day 49 of the MONEY program. For when steady progress is arriving but the habit is to move straight past it without pausing.
I am ready to release the habit of overlooking steady income and small wins while waiting for one big leap. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow gratitude for every payment, profit, and new income stream that arrives. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Drawn from Day 49 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
